overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character jogging along the Vespucci Beach boardwalk on a sunny day. The character passes various beach shops, palm trees, and pedestrians along the concrete promenade, moving from the Sidewalk Market area past the iconic blue Muscle Beach building.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach boardwalk with market stalls and souvenir shops

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the concrete promenade past beach vendors and palm trees

entered.detail: white building with blue signage reading 'VESPUCCI BEACH SIDEWALK MARKET'
tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade along the beach grass
beach shop with sunglasses display boards and yellow signage
tall yellow vertical sign with red text reading 'SALE'

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the Vespucci Beach Sidewalk Market, with the character jogging along a wide concrete promenade. Palm trees line the beach side while various beach shops and market stalls occupy the right side. The scene is brightly lit with clear blue skies and sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the large blue arched building at Muscle Beach

events.description: approaching the distinctive turquoise blue building with white arches

agents.ego_description: continuing to jog while approaching the large blue building, passing pedestrians on the path

notable_agents.action: woman in striped shirt walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large turquoise building with multiple white arches and columns, Muscle Beach gym area
wooden picnic tables with red and green umbrellas on the grass verge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the iconic blue Muscle Beach building with its distinctive arches. The crowd density increases slightly with more pedestrians visible. Picnic tables with colorful umbrellas appear on the left grassy area as the character moves closer to the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under the blue building arches with shops

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the blue building's arches

agents.ego_description: jogging under the arches of the blue building, passing close to the columns and shop fronts

entered.detail: ornate white columns supporting the blue building's arches
large sign reading 'SHARK BITES' on the blue building facade
white canvas awning extending over shop fronts on the right side
distant ferris wheel visible on the horizon beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the covered walkway of the blue building, passing white ornate columns and various shop signs including 'Shark Bites.' The lighting becomes slightly diffused under the arches. A white canopy appears on the right side covering additional storefronts, and a distant ferris wheel becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open promenade with closed storefronts and restaurants

events.description: exiting the covered area back into open sunlight, passing closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: jogging past groups of pedestrians and closed shop fronts along the open boardwalk

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera in the center of the path

entered.detail: row of closed shops with metal shutters down and red trim
vertical red sign with yellow text reading 'PIZZA'
large brick planters with greenery in front of the white canopy

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the blue building into the open promenade, passing closed storefronts with metal shutters and a prominent 'PIZZA' sign. The crowd density increases with groups of pedestrians walking along the path. The ferris wheel remains visible in the distant background as the character continues along the boardwalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along the Vespucci Beach boardwalk, transitioning from an open-air market into the shaded architecture of Muscle Beach before returning to the sunny promenade. It begins at the Sidewalk Market, where the character jogs along a wide concrete path lined with palm trees and beach stalls under a clear blue sky. As the character approaches the iconic blue Muscle Beach building, the environment shifts toward a more crowded area featuring picnic tables and colorful umbrellas. The scene then moves under the building's covered walkway, where the lighting becomes diffused among ornate white columns and shop signs before a distant ferris wheel emerges on the horizon. Finally, the camera emerges back into the bright sunlight, passing closed storefronts and a prominent pizza sign as the crowd density increases along the open boardwalk.
